claims.claim: Across 50 permutation bases (200 evaluation examples per configuration), both configurations achieve perfect accuracy on canonical-order prompts (1.000) and slightly reduced accuracy on permuted-order prompts (0.980), yielding a canonical-versus-permuted delta of +0.020.
